speaker: MATT
raw_text: Keyleth? As you're plummeting, Vax, I need you to roll a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I dodge it! I try and dodge it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need both of you guys to make dexterity saving throws. Actually, because you're riding Keyleth right now, it's going to be on the giant eagle form, because you're clutching it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's just on you. It's hard to avoid a hundred-plus-foot-wide arm.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is a save? Wait. This is a dex save, right? I'm blessing Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you see it coming? I'll say you have the time because it's so immense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Add a d4, yeah? Four, yeah! Okay, 24 total!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's not enough. You were one away. It's a 25 DC because this is a giant fucking arm! Both you and Vax-- I don't have the dice for this, so I'm going to have to use the app. You both suffer 87 points of bludgeoning damage as the force of a mountain slams into the side of your half-elf and eagle form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I immediately drop form and start falling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, any carryover damage, make sure to mark that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does Uncanny Dodge affect this at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unfortunately, because you were relying on her eagle maneuverability, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well then, I shoot the wings out immediately.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The wings emerge as both of you begin to plummet at this point.
